plugins.name: maru-hooks
plugins.description: Deterministic guard rails for Laravel + Claude Code: Pint/PHPStan/Prettier/ESLint on every edit, forbidden-path and destructive-command blocking (fail-closed), a project-extensible blocklist, and an opt-in gate-on-green stop hook. Stack-agnostic — works with any Laravel app.

plugins.name: maru-core
plugins.description: Generic Laravel discipline for Claude Code: TDD workflow agents, code/DTO/UI reviewers, skills, and /maru-core:init.

plugins.name: maru-rls
plugins.description: Postgres row-level-security multi-tenancy add-on: RLS pattern reference skill and a tenant-isolation security reviewer. Install only in multi-tenant projects.
